% mckey-basic.tex -- deterministic (NO \shuffle) answer-key check: authored
% option order is preserved, so the \cchoice authored 2nd must render at slot B
% and the key must read "Answer: B".  \solutions builds a student copy plus a
% key copy; the test reads the key copy.
\documentclass{autoexam}
\versions{A}
\solutions
\examsetup{number=1, date={Engine Test}}
\loadbank{mckey-bank.tex}

\begin{document}
\begin{mcproblems}
	\problem{mc_basic}
\end{mcproblems}
\end{document}
